title: vriesea × aurora
intro: Vriesea × aurora, also known as the Vriesea aurora, is a hybrid species of air plant or tillandsia that belongs to the bromeliad family. This epiphytic plant is known for its vibrant, long-lasting flowers in shades of pink and purple. The leaves and flowers of Vriesea × aurora have been used in herbal preparations for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vriesea × aurora include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health, and it can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for consumption.
